message:

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "armada-2121-build-interfaces-around-our-postgres-access",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "armada: Build interfaces around our postgres access",
+    "description": "Build interfaces around our postgres access. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current armada deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your armada version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n armada -l app.kubernetes.io/name=armada\nhelm list -n armada 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working armada installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review armada configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant armada configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n armada -l app.kubernetes.io/name=armada\nkubectl get configmap -n armada -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=armada\n```\nWe should make sure that users could bring their own SQL databases into Armada.  Currently we only allow postgres as our db but we should create an interface and potentially allow other databases."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Build interfaces around our postgres access",
+        "description": "zed with this [Jira Task](https://gr-oss.atlassian.net/browse/BATCH-413) by [Unito](https://www.unito.io)\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n armada -l app.kubernetes.io/name=armada\nkubectl get events -n armada --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Build interfaces around our postgres access\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "zed with this [Jira Task](https://gr-oss.atlassian.net/browse/BATCH-413) by [Unito](https://www.unito.io)",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
